title: agapanthus inapertus subsp. hollandii
intro: Agapanthus inapertus subsp. hollandii, also known as the blue agapanthus or lily of the Nile, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Agapanthus inapertus subsp. hollandii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
